title: Isagoge: Introduction to Aristotle's Categories
description: The textbook that taught logic to the entire medieval world: genus, species, differentia, property, accident.
introduction: The textbook that taught logic to the entire medieval world: genus, species, differentia, property, accident.

translation.text: Genus, species, difference, property, accident — these are the five predicables, the five ways of saying what something is.
